Comment: Least-privilege policy for the Relay INTAKE component (relay.intake) — Module 10, skill 3.2.1. The intake pipeline validates/normalizes a ticket, REDACTS PII with Amazon Comprehend (DetectPiiEntities + DetectEntities), uploads an accepted screenshot to the data bucket's attachments/ prefix, and reads it once with the vision tier through converse(). It needs EXACTLY: Comprehend detect on text in flight, S3 PutObject under attachments/ only, and Bedrock InvokeModel for the vision Converse call. No DynamoDB, no guardrail admin, no broad grant. Comprehend's stateless Detect* operations do not support resource-level ARNs, so they are bounded by an account+Region condition instead of a resource wildcard (the least-privilege idiom for such actions). ${ACCOUNT_ID}/${REGION} are substituted by setup.py at create time from STS (the account id is account-specific and never hard-coded).
